title: Food Service Managers
description: Plan, direct, or coordinate activities of an organization or department that serves food and beverages.

tasks.text: Count money and make bank deposits.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Establish standards for personnel performance and customer service.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Keep records required by government agencies regarding sanitation or food subsidies.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Schedule staff hours and assign duties.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Investigate and resolve complaints regarding food quality, service, or accommodations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Maintain food and equipment inventories, and keep inventory records.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Perform some food preparation or service tasks, such as cooking, clearing tables, and serving food and drinks when necessary.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Monitor budgets and payroll records, and review financial transactions to ensure that expenditures are authorized and budgeted.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Schedule and receive food and beverage deliveries, checking delivery contents to verify product quality and quantity.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Coordinate assignments of cooking personnel to ensure economical use of food and timely preparation.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Organize and direct worker training programs, resolve personnel problems, hire new staff, and evaluate employee performance in dining and lodging facilities.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Assess staffing needs and recruit staff, using methods such as newspaper advertisements or attendance at job fairs.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Estimate food, liquor, wine, and other beverage consumption to anticipate amounts to be purchased or requisitioned.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Monitor food preparation methods, portion sizes, and garnishing and presentation of food to ensure that food is prepared and presented in an acceptable manner.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Monitor compliance with health and fire regulations regarding food preparation and serving, and building maintenance in lodging and dining facilities.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Test cooked food by tasting and smelling it to ensure palatability and flavor conformity.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Order and purchase equipment and supplies.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Review work procedures and operational problems to determine ways to improve service, performance, or safety.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Arrange for equipment maintenance and repairs, and coordinate a variety of services, such as waste removal and pest control.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Monitor employee and patron activities to ensure liquor regulations are obeyed.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Greet guests, escort them to their seats, and present them with menus and wine lists.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Record the number, type, and cost of items sold to determine which items may be unpopular or less profitable.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Plan menus and food utilization, based on anticipated number of guests, nutritional value, palatability, popularity, and costs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Review menus and analyze recipes to determine labor and overhead costs, and assign prices to menu items.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Take dining reservations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Create specialty dishes and develop recipes to be used in dining facilities.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Schedule use of facilities or catering services for events such as banquets or receptions, and negotiate details of arrangements with clients.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Establish and enforce nutritional standards for dining establishments, based on accepted industry standards.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
